channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Backyard Baseball, a favorite game for 1990s kids, had been …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Backyard Baseball, a favorite game for 1990s kids, had been off the market for years. But a teacher from Chicago was determined to bring it back.
item.content:encoded: Backyard Baseball, a favorite game for 1990s kids, had been off the market for years. But a teacher from Chicago was determined to bring it back.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 新たな現代都市オープンワールドRPG『望月』は“差別化”に本気だった。モンスター捕獲にコマンド技風…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
新たな現代都市オープンワールドRPG『望月』は“差別化”に本気だった。モンスター捕獲にコマンド技風システムや自由すぎる移動能力など、野心作をいち早くプレイ - AUTOMATON

およそ2、3年前から、現代都市をテーマにしたオープンワールドのアニメ調RPGが次々と発表されてきた。その中で『NTE: Neverness to Everness』が今年先駆けてリリースされ、後を追う多数のタイトルの中に『望月（WANGYUE）』も名を連ねている。実のところ、『望月』は初公開時、そこまで高い期待を集めていなかった。し...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
新たな現代都市オープンワールドRPG『望月』は“差別化”に本気だった。モンスター捕獲にコマンド技風システムや自由すぎる移動能力など、野心作をいち早くプレイ - AUTOMATON

およそ2、3年前から、現代都市をテーマにしたオープンワールドのアニメ調RPGが次々と発表されてきた。その中で『NTE: Neverness to Everness』が今年先駆けてリリースされ、後を追う多数のタイトルの中に『望月（WANGYUE）』も名を連ねている。実のところ、『望月』は初公開時、そこまで高い期待を集めていなかった。し...

item.title: A coalition of 12 states led by California files an antitrus…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A coalition of 12 states led by California files an antitrust lawsuit to block Paramount's WBD merger, alleging it lessens competition in three markets (Gene Maddaus/Variety)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A coalition of 12 states led by California files an antitrust lawsuit to block Paramount's WBD merger, alleging it lessens competition in three markets (Gene Maddaus/Variety)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: The Graham-Trump alliance — which at first flummoxed many in…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: The Graham-Trump alliance — which at first flummoxed many in both men's inner circles — steered two terms of presidential foreign policy across multiple continents, and the GOP's agenda on Capitol Hill. https://cnn.it/4fa7gVB
item.content:encoded: The Graham-Trump alliance — which at first flummoxed many in both men's inner circles — steered two terms of presidential foreign policy across multiple continents, and the GOP's agenda on Capitol Hill. https://cnn.it/4fa7gVB

item.title: Climate tech's IPO drought may finally be ending as investor…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Climate tech's IPO drought may finally be ending as investors pile into energy companies powering the AI boom.
item.content:encoded: Climate tech's IPO drought may finally be ending as investors pile into energy companies powering the AI boom.

item.title: An outbreak of Legionnaires’ disease has sickened 56 people …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: An outbreak of Legionnaires’ disease has sickened 56 people on New York City’s Upper East Side, prompting widespread testing of building cooling towers in the area — including at the world-famous Guggenheim Museum.
item.content:encoded: An outbreak of Legionnaires’ disease has sickened 56 people on New York City’s Upper East Side, prompting widespread testing of building cooling towers in the area — including at the world-famous Guggenheim Museum.

item.author: Fox News - Breaking News Updates | Latest News Headlines | Phot… (@foxnews.com.web.brid.gy)

item.title: President Emmanuel Macron of France declared on Monday that …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: President Emmanuel Macron of France declared on Monday that Europeans were ready to defend their continent, “with blood, if necessary,” as he convened more than 25 leaders for a robust show of support for Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: President Emmanuel Macron of France declared on Monday that Europeans were ready to defend their continent, “with blood, if necessary,” as he convened more than 25 leaders for a robust show of support for Ukraine.

item.title: Several prominent GOP figures emerging as possible contender…

item.description: Several prominent GOP figures emerging as possible contenders for the South Carolina Senate seat following Lindsey Graham's death.
item.content:encoded: Several prominent GOP figures emerging as possible contenders for the South Carolina Senate seat following Lindsey Graham's death.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [51話]MAD - 大鳥雄介 | 少年ジャンプ＋ MAD 大鳥雄介 <隔週火曜更新！最新2話無…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[51話]MAD - 大鳥雄介 | 少年ジャンプ＋

MAD 大鳥雄介 <隔週火曜更新！最新2話無料>謎の生物エイリアンの襲来で、人類のほとんどが滅んだ惑星。青年ジョンと妹は、僅かな生き残りと共に新天地を求めて移動する日々。そんな中、突如エイリアンの攻撃を受けてしまい…。 [JC7巻発売中]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[51話]MAD - 大鳥雄介 | 少年ジャンプ＋

MAD 大鳥雄介 <隔週火曜更新！最新2話無料>謎の生物エイリアンの襲来で、人類のほとんどが滅んだ惑星。青年ジョンと妹は、僅かな生き残りと共に新天地を求めて移動する日々。そんな中、突如エイリアンの攻撃を受けてしまい…。 [JC7巻発売中]

item.title: Breaking News: President Trump said that Lindsey Graham’s si…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: President Trump said that Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham Nordone, should be appointed to finish his Senate term. After Graham's death on Saturday, South Carolina’s governor can appoint a replacement to serve out the remaining term.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: President Trump said that Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham Nordone, should be appointed to finish his Senate term. After Graham's death on Saturday, South Carolina’s governor can appoint a replacement to serve out the remaining term.

item.title: A biopic about Jair Bolsonaro, the former Brazilian leader, …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A biopic about Jair Bolsonaro, the former Brazilian leader, has upended his son Flávio Bolsonaro’s presidential hopes after leaks showed he negotiated with a disgraced banker to finance the film, reportedly the most expensive ever produced in Brazil.
item.content:encoded: A biopic about Jair Bolsonaro, the former Brazilian leader, has upended his son Flávio Bolsonaro’s presidential hopes after leaks showed he negotiated with a disgraced banker to finance the film, reportedly the most expensive ever produced in Brazil.

item.title: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: The world’s four highest-ra…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: The world’s four highest-ranked teams are also the last four standing at the 2026 World Cup — the first time that has happened since FIFA rankings were introduced. Coincidence? Not entirely.
item.content:encoded: From @theathleticfc.bsky.social: The world’s four highest-ranked teams are also the last four standing at the 2026 World Cup — the first time that has happened since FIFA rankings were introduced. Coincidence? Not entirely.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [第94話]限界OL霧切ギリ子 - ミートスパ土本 | 少年ジャンプ＋ 限界OL霧切ギリ子 ミー…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第94話]限界OL霧切ギリ子 - ミートスパ土本 | 少年ジャンプ＋

限界OL霧切ギリ子 ミートスパ土本 <毎週火曜更新！最新3話無料>限界生まれ限界育ち、癖の強い奴はだいたい知り合い…。霧切ギリ子が贈る、今日をなんとか生きるライフハック――!?読めば新たな知見を得る限界群像劇。 [JC3巻9/4発売予定]
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
[第94話]限界OL霧切ギリ子 - ミートスパ土本 | 少年ジャンプ＋

item.title: A statement warning that A.I. could transform the economy fa…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A statement warning that A.I. could transform the economy faster than previous technologies was signed by a group of economists and researchers, including 15 Nobel laureates and the chief economists of two of the leading A.I. labs, Open AI and Anthropic.
item.content:encoded: A statement warning that A.I. could transform the economy faster than previous technologies was signed by a group of economists and researchers, including 15 Nobel laureates and the chief economists of two of the leading A.I. labs, Open AI and Anthropic.

item.title: Water levels at a key waypoint on the Rhine River are at the…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Water levels at a key waypoint on the Rhine River are at the lowest for the time of year in decades as Europe struggles with heat, limiting fuel flows.
item.content:encoded: Water levels at a key waypoint on the Rhine River are at the lowest for the time of year in decades as Europe struggles with heat, limiting fuel flows.

item.title: NEW: The price of oil jumps more than 5% after President Tru…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: NEW: The price of oil jumps more than 5% after President Trump declares on social media that the U.S. would be resuming its blockade on Iran and would be “reimbursed” for helping ships transit the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: NEW: The price of oil jumps more than 5% after President Trump declares on social media that the U.S. would be resuming its blockade on Iran and would be “reimbursed” for helping ships transit the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 余ったFire HDでバス到着案内サイネージを自作した はじめに 以前、西武バスの到着予測をAle…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
余ったFire HDでバス到着案内サイネージを自作した

はじめに 以前、西武バスの到着予測をAlexaで案内するスキルを作った話を書きました。ODPT(公共交通オープンデータセンター)のリアルタイムデータへ移行し、「話しかければバスの到着時刻を教えてくれる」仕組みは安定して動くようになりました。 ただ実際に使ってみると、通勤前のバタバタしたタイミングで「Alexa、バ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
余ったFire HDでバス到着案内サイネージを自作した

はじめに 以前、西武バスの到着予測をAlexaで案内するスキルを作った話を書きました。ODPT(公共交通オープンデータセンター)のリアルタイムデータへ移行し、「話しかければバスの到着時刻を教えてくれる」仕組みは安定して動くようになりました。 ただ実際に使ってみると、通勤前のバタバタしたタイミングで「Alexa、バ...

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー AI使いすぎるとプロジェクトマネジメント力が低下する｜すぅ | AI駆動PM 「AIを使いすぎると…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
AI使いすぎるとプロジェクトマネジメント力が低下する｜すぅ | AI駆動PM

「AIを使いすぎると、プロジェクトマネジメント力が落ちる。」 AI漬けの育休生活から現場に戻ってきて、私が実感したことです。 この記事では、なぜAI依存でPM力が落ちるのかを整理していきます。 AI漬けの育休明け、数十人規模の現場に戻って感じた不安私は直近の半年間、育休を取っていました。ただ、この期間もプロジ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
AI使いすぎるとプロジェクトマネジメント力が低下する｜すぅ | AI駆動PM

「AIを使いすぎると、プロジェクトマネジメント力が落ちる。」 AI漬けの育休生活から現場に戻ってきて、私が実感したことです。 この記事では、なぜAI依存でPM力が落ちるのかを整理していきます。 AI漬けの育休明け、数十人規模の現場に戻って感じた不安私は直近の半年間、育休を取っていました。ただ、この期間もプロジ...

item.title: Bright with lemon and herbs, and packed with hearty greens, …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Bright with lemon and herbs, and packed with hearty greens, this highly adaptable soup is a warming one-pot meal perfect for a rainy day. nyti.ms/4vomlch
item.content:encoded: Bright with lemon and herbs, and packed with hearty greens, this highly adaptable soup is a warming one-pot meal perfect for a rainy day. nyti.ms/4vomlch

item.title: The best camping tents in the UK: 10 expert picks for every …
item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: The best camping tents in the UK: 10 expert picks for every outdoor adventure
item.content:encoded: The best camping tents in the UK: 10 expert picks for every outdoor adventure
